summary: Completed agent, prompt, skill, and distilled-knowledge wiring for auto-learning and BPMN on-demand workflows.
derived_updates: Explorer, Logger, and Debugger were rewritten to read runtime and memory before acting and to persist learning after each run.
Reusable prompts now cover post-run update, handoff generation, module refresh, BPMN extraction, access stabilization, and module-specific BPMN templates.
Distilled knowledge packs for transaction-mapping and monitoring-usage were seeded with business flow, dependencies, API, and handoff notes.
